with EvaluationProcedure():
    y = input_afh_vb1(Variable(2.))
    graph = EvaluationGraph(trace=True, renderer='svg').add_to_graph([y])
display(graph)
with EvaluationProcedure():
    y = input_afh_vb1(Variable(0.))
    graph = EvaluationGraph(trace=True, renderer='svg').add_to_graph([y])
display(graph)
